equite.title: Dashboard Équité (GPI & zone)
equite.subtitle: Parité filles/garçons · écart urbain/rural · écoles à risque (seuils UNESCO/IIPE).

banner.title: Inɗe ko reenaa
banner.message: Inɗe goɗɗe ɗe suuɗaama hakkunde fawaade e darnde maa (Sariya 037/AN/2016 e reenugol limle keeriiɗe).

consent.title: Sariya reenugol limle
consent.intro: Bisimillaa. Ado huutoraade GESTION-EE, taraa konngol ngol kanngol e tabbintinaa jaɓugol maa.

bullets.data: Limle ɗe yiitaa: inɗe ɓinngel, jaŋde, hawritaa, peeje, kontaktu mawɓe.
bullets.purpose: Faandaare: hooynude lowre jaŋde ngool e ɓeydude potal (rewɓe, gure ladde).
bullets.retention: Saanga marirde: tuma jaŋde + duuɓi 5 (njuumri kontoroli: duuɓi 3).
bullets.access: Hakke yiɗde njuumri maa: "Naatirɗe am" e dosaaru huutorɗo (Doosɗe 5C).
bullets.erasure: Hakke yejjital: heɓo DPO Wuuro Jaŋde (Doosɗe 5D, suuɗugol e nder ñalɗi 30).
bullets.minors: Wonande sukaaɓe, jaɓugol mawɓe ɓe seedaa e winndannde jaŋde nde siifaa.
bullets.contact: Kontaktu DPO: dpo@education.gouv.gn — Wuuro Nguurndam Jaŋde.

consent.readFull: Taro sariya reenugol limle on fof

legal.title: Sariya reenugol limle GESTION-EE
legal.subtitle: Sariya 037/AN/2016 (Gine) + RGPD — ñaarawol gollotooɗo ñalnde 1 lewru duuɓi 2026.

mentions.title: Limle yamiraaɗe
mentions.body: GESTION-EE yaltinaa e Wuuro Nguurndam Jaŋde, Dowla Gine. Hostinngu wonande lesdi koyɗol. Hooreejo bayyinaali: Sekereteer Heeriɗo Wuuro.

data.title: Limle ɗe yiitaa
data.body: Tinndi limle ɗe golliraa ɗe haaniraa tan e kuule golle pamuyhaɗe:
data.itemIdentity: Inɗe ɓinngel (yettoode, inde, ñalnde jibinaa, ɗiɗɗol, fotoo so woni).
data.itemSchool: Limle jaŋde (jaŋde, kalaas, hawrital, peeje, biloo).
data.itemHealth: Limle cellal jaŋde (alergiyaaji, vaksɛnaaji, yaadu nurusi) — naatirɗe haaɗɗe.
data.itemContact: Kontaktu mawɓe (inde, simasin) wonande haalannde jaŋde-galle.

purpose.title: Faandaareeji
purpose.body: Hooynugol lowre jaŋde ngool, ɓeydugol njuɓɓudi jannginooɓe e jeeyngal, ƴeewtannde fenoore, ɓeydugol jaŋde rewɓe, haɓugol e nattugol jaŋde.

legalBasis.title: Doosɗe yamiraaɗe
legalBasis.body: Sariya 037/AN/2016 Dowla Gine. RGPD (Yuropa) wonande huutorɓe e Yuropa. Mooɓal lowre golle (artikel 6.1.e RGPD).

retention.title: Saanga marirde
retention.body: Limle jaŋde maantinɗe: saanga jaŋde + duuɓi 5. Biloo e diplomeeji: tuma fof (manngu lesdi). Njuumri kontoroli: duuɓi 3. Limle suuɗaaɗe: marraa wonande estatistik dowla.

rights.title: Hakkeeji maa
rights.body: Hakke Sariya 037/AN/2016 e RGPD, ko maa marɗo hakkeeji:
rights.itemAccess: Hakke naatugol: yiide limle maa e njuumri kontoroli ɓettiɗe e maa.
rights.itemRectification: Hakke ƴeewtannde: kosirgol limle bonɗe e nokku jaŋde maa.
rights.itemPortability: Hakke yaadu: yaltinde limle maa e fasaade udditiinde.
rights.itemObjection: Hakke salaade: salaade gollanɗe ɗe haaniraa.

contact.title: Kontaktu DPO
contact.body: Wonande naamnde wallaa huutoraade hakkeeji maa, heɓo Joom Reenugol Limle Wuuro Jaŋde: dpo@education.gouv.gn — adres: Wuuro Nguurndam Jaŋde, Boulevard du Commerce, Konakri, Gine.

reorganisation.title: Hesnitde lowre duɗe
reorganisation.subtitle: Karta SIG ngam wallude e ƴeewndaade peeje (Module 3A).
reorganisation.errorLoad: Karta wonaa ko heɓotoo — ƴeewtu backend walla cache.

descriptions.infrastructureGaps: Ndiyam, kuule, kuuɓe walla internet ngalaa.

simulateur.title: Simulateer what-if lowre duɗe
simulateur.subtitle: Eɓɓito udditgol, uddugol walla dentungol duɗe e yiy impact ɗum (Module 3B).

merge.instruction: Suɓo duɗe ≥ 2 caggal ɗum daɓɓu Dental

transferts.title: Saatire jannguɓe
transferts.subtitle: Ƴeewu duɗe ɗe jannguɓe ɓuri walla famɗi, eɓɓito saatire ɓe (Module 2D).

investissements.title: Adadiiji ñoƴƴude jokkere
investissements.subtitle: Ɗoogol ngenndi jokkooje to ñoƴƴa-tude tafee (Module 3C).
